holdings.infoBox: NFXL is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt stock at 47.01%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 27.11%, Netflix at 17.76%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 14.41%, and Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 13.18%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily NFLX Bull 2X ETF (NFXL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Netflix stock. NFXL was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
